item.title: Ford’s V10 Mustang Build
item.description: A unique engine swap build featuring a Ford V10 installed into a Mustang platform. The video explores fabrication work, tuning, and custom engineering. What’s your opinion on unconventional engine swaps?

media:content.media:title: Ford’s V10 Mustang Build
media:content.media:description: A unique engine swap build featuring a Ford V10 installed into a Mustang platform. The video explores fabrication work, tuning, and custom engineering. What’s your opinion on unconventional engine swaps?

item.title: Mini-Ex Gets a Second Look
item.description: A detailed inspection and follow-up work on a mini excavator after initial evaluation. The video focuses on diagnostics and mechanical assessment. What’s the most important check on used equipment?

media:content.media:title: Mini-Ex Gets a Second Look
media:content.media:description: A detailed inspection and follow-up work on a mini excavator after initial evaluation. The video focuses on diagnostics and mechanical assessment. What’s the most important check on used equipment?

item.title: 6.0 Powerstroke Review
item.description: A detailed breakdown of the 6.0 Powerstroke engine covers its strengths, weaknesses, and common reliability issues. Why is this engine so debated?

media:content.media:title: 6.0 Powerstroke Review
media:content.media:description: A detailed breakdown of the 6.0 Powerstroke engine covers its strengths, weaknesses, and common reliability issues. Why is this engine so debated?

item.title: Gives the K-Car a Fresh Wrap
item.description: A classic K-Car gets a fresh exterior wrap, giving it a renewed look while preserving its original character. How much can appearance change a build?

media:content.media:title: Gives the K-Car a Fresh Wrap
media:content.media:description: A classic K-Car gets a fresh exterior wrap, giving it a renewed look while preserving its original character. How much can appearance change a build?

item.title: 1999 Chevy Gets a Cummins Upgrade
item.description: A 1999 Chevy receives a Cummins engine upgrade, combining classic truck styling with diesel power and torque-focused performance. What changes when a gas truck goes diesel?

media:content.media:title: 1999 Chevy Gets a Cummins Upgrade
media:content.media:description: A 1999 Chevy receives a Cummins engine upgrade, combining classic truck styling with diesel power and torque-focused performance. What changes when a gas truck goes diesel?

item.title: DT466 Fargo: Old Army Truck Build
item.description: An old Fargo army truck powered by a DT466 engine is restored and modified into a functional heavy-duty machine. What challenges come with military truck builds?

media:content.media:title: DT466 Fargo: Old Army Truck Build
media:content.media:description: An old Fargo army truck powered by a DT466 engine is restored and modified into a functional heavy-duty machine. What challenges come with military truck builds?

item.title: Pro Welder Reviews a $70 Amazon Welder
item.description: A budget-friendly $70 welder is tested by a professional to see how it performs in real workshop conditions. Can ultra-cheap tools actually hold up?

media:content.media:title: Pro Welder Reviews a $70 Amazon Welder
media:content.media:description: A budget-friendly $70 welder is tested by a professional to see how it performs in real workshop conditions. Can ultra-cheap tools actually hold up?

item.title: Building a Kenworth K100
item.description: A classic Kenworth K100 is brought into the shop for restoration and customization into a functional heavy-duty build. What makes this cabover truck so iconic?

media:content.media:title: Building a Kenworth K100
media:content.media:description: A classic Kenworth K100 is brought into the shop for restoration and customization into a functional heavy-duty build. What makes this cabover truck so iconic?

item.title: New Truck Axle Issue
item.description: A newly discovered axle issue creates challenges during a truck build or repair, requiring diagnosis and correction. What caused the failure?

media:content.media:title: New Truck Axle Issue
media:content.media:description: A newly discovered axle issue creates challenges during a truck build or repair, requiring diagnosis and correction. What caused the failure?

item.title: Cat 3126 Teardown and Rebuild
item.description: A complete teardown and rebuild of a Cat 3126 engine reveals wear patterns, internal damage, and the steps needed to bring it back to life. What does a full rebuild uncover?

media:content.media:title: Cat 3126 Teardown and Rebuild
media:content.media:description: A complete teardown and rebuild of a Cat 3126 engine reveals wear patterns, internal damage, and the steps needed to bring it back to life. What does a full rebuild uncover?
